description_long: This is a double-bladed battle axe with a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design. The axe features two large, dark metallic blades with a rough, weathered texture and a slightly asymmetrical, jagged edge profile. The central section where the blades meet is reinforced with a red, circular binding that appears to be made of leather or wrapped cloth, adding both structural integrity and visual contrast. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural grain and a pronounced, organic curve, ending in a hooked pommel also wrapped in red material. The overall construction suggests a hand-forged, robust tool, likely intended for heavy-duty use or as a decorative or ceremonial weapon. The combination of materials and the exaggerated, stylized form make it stand out as a unique object in any urban or fantasy setting.
description: A double-bladed, fantasy-style axe with rough dark metal blades, a curved wooden handle, and red leather wrappings at the center and pommel.
description_view_0: The front view shows both large, jagged blades, the red central binding, and the full curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the blades and handle, emphasizing the sharpness and the layered construction.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the twin blades, red binding, and the hooked pommel, with slight asymmetry in blade shape.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the thinness of the axe and the alignment of the handle and blades.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, wrapped at the pommel in red leather, ergonomic and uniquely styled with a hooked end.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed, wide and jagged with rough edges, asymmetrical, and a central red binding; no beard or poll, fantasy-inspired.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible red leather binding securing the blade to the handle.
